description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a deep, dark fabric upholstery and a clean, boxy silhouette. The seat features a single, wide cushion, while the backrest is adorned with four large, loose pillows—two in a dark green geometric pattern and two in solid white—flanked by two smaller, dark brown accent pillows. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a robust and contemporary appearance. The legs are short, block-shaped, and barely visible, suggesting a low-profile stance. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, emphasizing comfort and simplicity. This sofa would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with dark upholstery, broad straight armrests, and a mix of green, white, and brown accent pillows. Its minimalist design and low-profile legs make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's deep seat, thick armrest, and the layered arrangement of pillows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical pillow arrangement, wide seat, and the full width of the armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and pillow configuration seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backrest and the sofa's solid, continuous back panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, continuous seat cushion with four large, loose back cushions (two green patterned, two white) and two smaller brown accent pillows, all arranged symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat and backrest height, with a boxy, unadorned profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-shaped legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible and likely made of dark wood or plastic, providing a low-profile base.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at the same height as the armrests, supporting loose back cushions without visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric upholstery on the main body, with green geometric patterned back cushions and plain white and brown accent pillows; no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
